'''''Challenge'' 74''' was a roleplaying magazine from [[1994]]. It contained many roleplaying articles, including an adventure for the [[West End Games]] ''[[Star Wars]]'' [[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game|D6]] system. The article was called "[[HoloNet Waystation (article)|HoloNet Waystation]]" and was written by [[Martin Wixted]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}
